title: Marvel Superheroes
description: This mod adds several Marvel Universe characters into minecraft such as Captain America and Wolverine.
body:
![Mod Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31e50db8380b87cd0be5dc97c4f22c6831f28523.png) ### If you want to commision a mod, message @u1timatej7 on Discord.
This mod adds many Marvel characters into the world of Minecraft! The mod is inspired by a mix of content from all corners of the Marvel universe, including both the MCU and comics. By collecting new resources such as **vibranium**, **titanium** or **reinforced leather**, you can craft and become iconic Marvel characters! By crafting superhero suits, you gain access to all the abilities of that character from **Spider-Man's web swinging** to **Cyclops' optic blasts!** Many suits have alternate styles, allowing you to become your favourite version of each hero! Examples include Spider-Gwen, Wolverine's Classic Brown Suit and Captain Carter! The 1.21.1 version of the mod requires NeoForge 21.1.181 or greater to function properly. This mod requires **[Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)** to function properly. Gameplay by Henwy and Wisp: **Current List of Characters:** - Ant-Man - Black Panther - Captain America - Cyclops - Deadpool - Iron Man (WIP) - Quicksilver - Spider-Man - Thor - War Machine (WIP) - Wasp - Wolverine
Detailed List of Characters - **Ant-Man** - Brew Pym Particles to change size - Shrink down to 2 pixels tall - Upgraded suit can grow to 16 blocks tall! - **Black Panther** - Craft using vibranium weave - Upgraded suit can absorb and release kinetic energy - **Captain America** - Craft either a vibranium or proto-adamantium shield - The shield functions as a melee or ranged weapon - **Captain Marvel** - Blast enemies with a continuous photon blast - Suit provides access to flight - **Cyclops** - Fire optic blasts that reach up to 100 blocks! - Fire a wide blast that hits multiple enemies - **Deadpool** - Heal quickly using Deadpool’s healing factor - Craft katanas to attack with both hands at once! - **Iron Man (WIP)** - Build and upgrade 25 different suits! - Suits can fire both repulsors and the unibeam - Suits provide access to flight and a dynamic HUD - **Quicksilver** - Run at speeds of up to 40 blocks per second! - Run across water or up mountains - Use a sonic boom to stun enemies - **Spider-Man** - Craft Web Fluid to swing from webs - Activate Spider Sense to detect nearby enemies - **Thor** - Craft either Mjölnir or Stormbreaker out of uru - Use the weapons to gain access to Thor’s flight and strength - **War Machine (WIP)** - Fire any crossbow projectile from the shoulder turret - Suits can fire both repulsors and the unibeam - Suits provide access to flight and a dynamic HUD - **Wasp** - Brew Pym Particles to change size - Shrink down to 2 pixels tall and fly using the Wasp’s wings! - **Winter Soldier** - Attack quickly with Winter Soldier’s Knife - Automatically catch any shield with the metal arm - **Wolverine** - Fight with adamantium claws, dealing fast damage - Heal quickly using Wolverine’s healing factor
**Coming Soon:** - Even more Iron Man Suits **How to Collect X-Genes** - Craft a syringe and collect blood samples from villagers (shift+right click) - Brew the blood samples in a brewing stand with nether warts - 40% of the samples will contain X-Genes
Disclaimer This Minecraft mod includes characters and elements based on Marvel Comics. All characters, logos, and related materials are owned by Marvel Entertainment, LLC, a subsidiary of The Walt Disney Company. This mod is fan-made and unofficial, and it is not affiliated with Marvel Entertainment, LLC, Marvel Comics, or The Walt Disney Company.
